response.justification: Despite a strong and diverse software engineering background, the candidate has no demonstrable professional experience with C++, STL, or industrial automation systems — the core requirements of the role. Their recent work is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with no evidence of multi-threaded, low-latency C++ systems, message brokers, IEC 62443, or industrial IoT protocols. The single C++ mention from 2014–2015 is outdated and isolated, insufficient to meet senior-level expectations.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with modern web and distributed systems
Strong track record in open-source contributions and technical mentoring
Proven ability to deliver complex systems across diverse domains and platforms
concerns: No recent or professional C++/STL development experience in the last 9+ years
Lacks exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) and OT protocols
Primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) is misaligned with core C++ requirements
